scenario: To verify the 'Placement Portal' brand link in the navigation bar redirects to the home page.
expectedResult: Should be redirected to the '/placementportal/' URL.

scenario: To verify the 'Home' link in the navigation bar redirects to the home page.
expectedResult: Should be redirected to the '/placementportal/' URL.

scenario: To verify the 'Drives' link in the navigation bar redirects to the drives page.
expectedResult: Should be redirected to the '/placementportal/drives/' URL.

scenario: To verify the search input field allows typing and displays the 'Search…' placeholder.
expectedResult: Should be able to type text into the search field and the placeholder should disappear upon typing.

scenario: To verify the dark mode toggle button changes the theme of the page.
expectedResult: Should be able to click the button and the page theme should switch between light and dark mode, and the icon should change (moon/sun).

scenario: To verify the theme preference persists after a page refresh or navigation.
expectedResult: Should be that the selected theme (light/dark) remains active after page reload or navigating to another page and returning.

scenario: To verify the 'Login' button in the navigation bar redirects to the login page (current page).
expectedResult: Should be that clicking the button reloads or navigates to the same login page URL.

scenario: To verify successful login with valid credentials (positive).
expectedResult: Should be redirected to the user's dashboard or home page after clicking 'Sign In to Portal'.

scenario: To verify login attempt with incorrect password (negative).
expectedResult: Should be an error message indicating invalid credentials and no redirection.

scenario: To verify login attempt with unregistered email address (negative).
expectedResult: Should be an error message indicating unregistered email or invalid credentials and no redirection.

scenario: To verify login attempt with empty email field (empty fields).
expectedResult: Should be a validation error or a browser-level 'required' field message for the email field.

scenario: To verify login attempt with empty password field (empty fields).
expectedResult: Should be a validation error or a browser-level 'required' field message for the password field.

scenario: To verify email input field with invalid email format (edge case/negative).
expectedResult: Should be a validation error message specifically for invalid email format.

scenario: To verify password field character visibility toggle (eye icon).
expectedResult: Should be that clicking the eye icon toggles the password visibility between plain text and masked characters.

scenario: To verify the 'Remember me' checkbox can be checked and unchecked.
expectedResult: Should be that the checkbox state toggles correctly upon clicking.

scenario: To verify the 'Forgot Password?' link redirects to the password recovery page.
expectedResult: Should be redirected to the 'Forgot Password' or password reset page.

scenario: To verify pressing 'Enter' key while in either input field submits the login form.
expectedResult: Should be that the login form is submitted as if the 'Sign In to Portal' button was clicked.

scenario: To verify the behavior of the login page when JavaScript is disabled (non-functional).
expectedResult: Should be that the page either degrades gracefully with basic HTML login or displays a message indicating JavaScript is required.

scenario: To verify SQL Injection attempt in the email address field.
expectedResult: Should be that the application handles the input securely, preventing SQL injection, and likely displaying an invalid credential error.

scenario: To verify SQL Injection attempt in the password field.
expectedResult: Should be that the application handles the input securely, preventing SQL injection, and likely displaying an invalid credential error.

scenario: To verify XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) attempt in the email address field.
expectedResult: Should be that the application sanitizes or encodes the input, preventing script execution, and displaying the raw string or an error.

scenario: To verify XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) attempt in the password field.
expectedResult: Should be that the application sanitizes or encodes the input, preventing script execution, and displaying the raw string or an error.

scenario: To verify the application's response to multiple failed login attempts (rate limiting/edge case).
expectedResult: Should be that the application implements rate limiting (e.g., CAPTCHA, temporary lockout) after a certain number of failed attempts.
testData: Multiple invalid login attempts (e.g., 5-10 times) with 'test@example.com', 'IncorrectPassword'.

scenario: To verify HTTPS is enforced for the login page (non-functional).
expectedResult: Should be that the page URL always starts with 'https://' and there are no mixed content warnings.

scenario: To verify the floating chat button opens the chat modal.
expectedResult: Should be that clicking the 'pp-chat-fab' button opens the 'ppChatModal'.

scenario: To verify the chat modal displays the initial welcome message from the bot.
expectedResult: Should be that the 'conversation-area' contains the message '👋 Hi! I'm your Placement Portal Assistant. How can I help you today?'.

scenario: To verify the chat modal can be closed using the 'Close' button.
expectedResult: Should be that clicking the 'btn-close-white' button dismisses the 'ppChatModal'.

scenario: To verify the chat modal can be closed by pressing the 'Escape' key.
expectedResult: Should be that pressing the 'Escape' key dismisses the 'ppChatModal'.

scenario: To verify typing a message into the chat input field works correctly.
expectedResult: Should be able to type text into the 'pp-user-input' field.

scenario: To verify the chat send button is present and clickable.
expectedResult: Should be that the 'btn btn-primary' send button is visible and active.

scenario: To verify the chat input field is marked as required (empty fields).
expectedResult: Should be that attempting to send an empty message triggers a validation message from the browser or application.

scenario: To verify the chat input field handles long messages (edge case).
expectedResult: Should be able to type a very long message without breaking the UI or input field.

scenario: To verify the overall layout of the login page on a desktop resolution (screen layout).
expectedResult: Should be that the left and right panels are displayed side-by-side with appropriate spacing and alignment as per the screenshot.

scenario: To verify the responsive layout of the login page on a mobile resolution (screen layout).
expectedResult: Should be that the left and right panels stack vertically, and navigation elements adapt (e.g., hamburger menu for links if implemented).

scenario: To verify the 'Secure Login' badge is visible and correctly positioned.
expectedResult: Should be that the badge with 'SECURE LOGIN' text and shield icon is displayed above the 'Welcome back' heading.

scenario: To verify the appearance of the 'Apply to Drives Instantly' feature bullet.
expectedResult: Should be that the rocket icon, main text 'Apply to Drives Instantly', and sub-text 'Browse and apply to upcoming placement drives' are all correctly displayed and aligned.

scenario: To verify the appearance of the 'AI-Powered Career Assistant' feature bullet.
expectedResult: Should be that the brain icon, main text 'AI-Powered Career Assistant', and sub-text 'Get help with interview prep and resume tips' are all correctly displayed and aligned.

scenario: To verify the page load performance and perceived loading speed.
expectedResult: Should be that the page loads within acceptable performance metrics (e.g., LCP < 2.5s, TBT < 200ms) on a standard internet connection.

scenario: To verify accessibility of interactive elements via keyboard navigation.
expectedResult: Should be that all clickable and input elements (links, buttons, input fields, checkbox) are navigable using Tab and Shift+Tab keys in a logical order.

scenario: To verify proper ARIA labels and roles are set for accessibility compliance, especially for search and theme toggle.
expectedResult: Should be that screen readers can correctly announce the purpose of the search input and theme toggle button.

scenario: To verify color contrast ratios for text and UI elements meet WCAG guidelines.
expectedResult: Should be that all text and interactive elements have sufficient contrast against their background for readability, in both light and dark modes.
